summary: A clip from a CBS Mornings segment with an EXCLUSIVE label. It opens with footage of a person standing at the end of a pier over open water, then cuts to a seated interview of a man and a woman facing an off-camera interviewer in a room. The lower-third reads SLAIN STUDENT'S PARENTS SAY MURDER WAS PREVENTABLE.

script.scene: Footage of a person standing at the end of a pier over open water; CBS Mornings and EXCLUSIVE labels visible.
A man and a woman are interviewed side by side; lower-third reads SLAIN STUDENT'S PARENTS SAY MURDER WAS PREVENTABLE.
Close-up of the man continuing to speak during the interview.

notable_text: CBS MORNINGS; EXCLUSIVE; SLAIN STUDENT'S PARENTS SAY MURDER WAS PREVENTABLE
